subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate the interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

I would be happy to schedule an introductory call. Here are three available slots:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00-16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00-16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00-16:00

Please let me know which works best for you, and I will send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not able to share internal contact details. If there is a specific matter you would like to escalate, I am happy to facilitate the conversation directly.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
